channel.title: AV Edu Resources — Aurelia Vale
channel.description: Practical AI prompt packs and writing tools for bloggers, writers, and content creators — by Aurelia Vale.

item.title: 50 AI Prompts for K-12 English Teachers
item.description:
50 copy-paste AI prompts for lesson planning, worksheets, grading & admin. Done in 60 seconds. Written by a retired English teacher with 30 years of experience.

Available now — €12.99.

item.title: 50 AI Prompts for Homemakers
item.description:
51 copy-paste prompts for meal planning, home organization, parenting, budgeting & self-care. Save 10+ hours every week.

Available now — €14.99.

item.title: SEO Content Workflow Bundle — Pack 1 + Pack 2
item.description:
Get the SEO Keyword Finder and AI Content Brief Generator together — find your keywords and turn them into ready-to-write content briefs in one workflow.

Available now — €29.99 (save €4.99).

item.title: AI Content Brief Generator — Long-Tail Keyword Edition (Pack 2)
item.description:
8 prompts to turn any keyword into a complete content brief — the natural next step after finding your keywords.

Available now — €14.99.

item.title: SEO Keyword Finder AI Prompts — Complete 2026 Pack (Pack 1)
item.description:
15 proven AI prompts to find long-tail keywords, low competition keywords, and competitor gaps. Perfect for SEO marketers, bloggers, and content creators.

Available now — €19.99.
